home.about.title: Pioneering Islamic Digital Innovation Since 1979
home.about.p1: PDMS has been at the forefront of Islamic technology for more than four decades, creating impactful digital experiences that empower Muslims around the world.
home.about.p2: From Quran applications and Islamic lifestyle tools to multilingual communication technologies, our products are designed to combine authenticity, innovation, and user experience at a global scale. Our mission is to bridge faith and technology.

about.overview.title: Connecting Hearts & Minds Through Technology
about.overview.p1: PDMS began in 1979 as a pioneer in native language computing, developing specialized word processors and layouts for Urdu publishing. Over the years, our technical focus expanded to meet the spiritual needs of Muslims globally.
about.overview.p2: Today, we maintain the world's most popular Islamic applications, including Quran Majeed, Quran Pak, and Quran TV, alongside regional utilities like the Easy Urdu Keyboard. Our products combine state-of-the-art UI/UX, accurate content proofed by scholars, and highly optimized code bases.
about.overview.p3: Beyond consumer apps, we have successfully developed national-scale registry databases for public sector entities like NADRA and NARA, establishing ourselves as a trusted software vendor for governments and enterprise companies.
about.timeline.title: Key Historical Milestones
about.timeline.subtitle: A look back at how we started and how we became a global leader in Islamic digital products.
about.vm.vision.title: Our Vision
about.vm.vision.text: To become the world's most trusted partner in Islamic technology and localized computing, bridging cultural and spiritual needs with state-of-the-art software systems that enrich people's lives on a daily basis.
about.vm.mission.title: Our Mission
about.vm.mission.text: We combine strict scriptural authenticity with cutting-edge user experience to build digital products that simplify scripture study, prayer tracking, language input, and enterprise engagement for global audiences.

about.values.subtitle: Our values represent the core commitments that guide our design, development, and customer interactions.

product.features.title: Key Features
product.downloads.label: Downloads:
products.seo.title: Our Products | Pakistan Data Management Services
products.seo.desc: Discover our digital ecosystem: Quran Majeed, Quran Pak, Easy Urdu Keyboard, Quran TV, Hadith App, 3D Salah Guide, EngageAI, and Enterprise Software Development.
products.items.qm.name: Quran Majeed
products.items.qm.desc: Our flagship app serves millions of Muslims daily, providing high-fidelity audio recitations by world-famous Qaris, translations in 45+ languages, interactive Tafsir, verified prayer timings, and a Qibla locator. Its advanced Quran memorization module features audio loops, speed controls, and user tracking.
products.items.qm.f1: 15+ World-Class Qaris with offline audio support
products.items.qm.f2: Interactive Translations & Tafsir (Urdu, English, French, etc.)
products.items.qm.f3: Precision Hijri calendar and global Prayer Timings
products.items.qp.name: Quran Pak
products.items.qp.desc: Designed for readers seeking a simple Mushaf-like interface. Quran Pak replicates the physical page-turning feel with authentic Arabic text styles (Indo-Pak & Uthmani scripts). It eliminates distractions, focusing purely on legibility and ease of reading for senior users and students.
products.items.qp.f2: Pinch-to-zoom scaling and dark mode reading support
products.items.qp.f4: Fully offline capability with zero ads
products.items.pt.name: Prayer Time
products.items.pt.desc: Never Miss a Prayer, Stay connected to your faith with Prayer Time, the essential prayer companion designed specifically for your Android TV. Experience accurate prayer times displayed beautifully on your big screen, ensuring you never miss a single prayer.
products.items.qt.name: Quran TV
products.items.qt.desc: A streaming television application optimized for Smart TV and Apple TV systems. It broadcasts continuous 24/7 Quran recitations paired with beautiful scenery overlays, Islamic lectures, spiritual advice programs, educational contents for children, and live streams from Makkah and Madinah.
products.items.qt.f1: High-definition video rendering on large screens
products.items.qt.f3: Vast catalog of lectures and children's content
products.items.qt.f4: Custom audio track selection (choose your reciter)
products.items.eu.name: Easy Urdu Keyboard
products.items.eu.desc: Our award-winning custom keyboard helps users communicate naturally in Urdu. It translates English letters into Urdu script on the fly (transliteration) and features accurate voice-to-text Urdu transcription, a built-in Urdu dictionary, customized themes, and an image editor for social status creation.
products.items.eu.f2: Voice typing with high Urdu vocabulary accuracy
products.items.eu.f4: Integrated text layout writing on social photos
products.items.es.name: Easy Sindhi Keyboard
products.items.es.desc: Type Sindhi using Roman English, Sindhi voice typing, smart suggestions, beautiful keyboard themes, fast language switching, and a built-in image text editor.
products.items.es.f4: Themes, emojis, and image text editor
products.items.hc.name: Hadith Collection
products.items.hc.desc: A comprehensive digital library compiling thousands of verified Hadith from primary source books including Sahih al-Bukhari, Sahih Muslim, Sunan Abi Dawud, and more. Features robust search systems, categorization topics, Arabic scripture, and parallel English/Urdu translations.
products.items.3d.name: 3D Salah Guide
products.items.3d.desc: An educational application utilizing interactive 3D avatars to demonstrate step-by-step prayer guidelines. It outlines body postures, pronunciation guides, recitation audios, and Wudu instructions. Perfect for children, new Muslims, and educators.
products.items.3d.f1: 3D rotatable camera controls for exact postures
products.items.3d.f2: Wudu instructions with animated visual guides
products.items.3d.f3: Audio recitation for all prayer phrases
products.items.taf.name: QURAN TAFSEER
products.items.taf.desc: A dedicated Quran study platform offering tafsir, translations, and detailed explanations to help users better understand the teachings and meanings of the Holy Quran.
products.items.rt.name: Ramadan Times
products.items.rt.desc: Stay updated with accurate Sehri and Iftar timings, prayer schedules, and Ramadan-related Islamic tools for a spiritually organized Ramadan experience.
products.items.kb.name: Kitabi
products.items.kb.tagline: The Modern Library of Urdu Books
products.items.kb.desc: Download Kitabi and discover a modern world of Urdu books, audiobooks, and immersive digital reading experiences designed for readers everywhere.
projects.seo.title: Case Studies & Projects | Pakistan Data Management Services
projects.seo.desc: Explore our large-scale software solutions: NADRA registration databases, King Fahad Quran printing tools, NARA biometric registries, and Imagine Forensic systems.
projects.items.nadra.title: NADRA National Registration Platform
projects.items.nadra.desc: Designed and engineered a high-volume registration software system capable of processing millions of National Database Forms (NDFs). The platform was optimized for secure data input, smart character recognition, and dual-script (English & Urdu) identity validation.
projects.items.nadra.challenge: Processing massive stacks of hand-written paper application forms daily without introduction of typographical errors in names, addresses, or identifiers.
projects.items.nadra.solution: We built a custom visual data entry system with real-time word dictionaries, integrated Urdu keyboard mappings, and layout validators that flagged discrepancy before record commits.
projects.items.nadra.impact: NADRA successfully cleared backlog queues, onboarding millions of citizens into the unified database in record-breaking operational timeframes.
projects.items.kf.title: King Fahad Quran Printing Support
projects.items.kf.desc: Collaborated with Saudi Arabia's leading Quran printing complex to engineer custom typography, Arabic layout systems, and proofreading aids. This ensured the digitized Arabic text strictly adheres to classical Uthmani print styles, maintaining visual balance.
projects.items.kf.challenge: Digital fonts and standard typesetting software frequently distort critical Arabic vowel marks (Harakat) and letter bonds required in classical Quran printing.
projects.items.kf.solution: Developed custom vector typography glyphs and a layout proofing editor that displays precise alignment of vowels on top of Arabic letters down to the sub-pixel level.
projects.items.kf.impact: The Quranic text verified by our tools has been printed millions of times and distributed worldwide with 100% scriptural correctness.
projects.items.qe.title: QuranExplorer Digital Portal
projects.items.qe.desc: Built one of the earliest and most visited web portals for Quran study. Features high-quality audio streaming of world-renowned Qaris, synced translations, side-by-side Tafsir comparisons, and bookmarks synchronization across browsers.
projects.items.qe.challenge: Delivering audio streams in low-bandwidth regions while maintaining text synchronization on web browsers.
projects.items.qe.solution: Designed a lightweight media player with dynamic pre-buffering and verse timestamp mappings that triggers active verse styling on scroll.
projects.items.qe.impact: QuranExplorer became a benchmark in Islamic online education, helping millions of people study the Quran in 25+ language translations.
projects.items.nara.title: NARA Biometrics Registry Database
projects.items.nara.desc: Developed a secure biometric registration database and search engine for cataloging immigrant records. Integrated photo capture, fingerprint matches, and dynamic background search query engines to streamline registry management.
projects.items.nara.challenge: Handling complex search queries across non-standardized foreign name spellings while preventing duplicate biometric identities.
projects.items.nara.solution: Configured advanced phonetics search algorithms (Soundex adjusted for regional languages) combined with direct local biometric verification checks.
projects.items.nara.impact: NARA security personnel successfully automated identity validation, reducing identity fraud margins and speeding up registration cycles.
projects.items.imagine.title: Imagine Forensic Sketching System
projects.items.imagine.desc: An advanced digital forensic sketching platform allowing officers to compile detailed suspect portraits based on witness descriptions. Features drag-and-drop facial modules, sizing modifiers, and background database portrait matching.
projects.items.imagine.challenge: Manual forensic sketches take hours to create, delay investigation trails, and require specialized artists.
projects.items.imagine.solution: Built a library-based sketching canvas with thousands of facial feature presets (eyes, nose, jawlines, hair) that officers can resize and adjust in real time.
projects.items.imagine.impact: Investigative teams compiled and shared suspect sketches with patrol units in under 20 minutes, leading to quicker search warrants.

support.seo.title: Help & Support | Pakistan Data Management Services
support.seo.desc: Find troubleshooting guides, Adhan configuration tips, payment restorations, and contact our technical support team for assistance.
support.faq.notifications.title: Notifications & Adhan Alerts
support.faq.notifications.q1: Why am I not receiving Adhan notifications or prayer alerts on my device?
support.faq.notifications.a1:
Operating system battery savers frequently block timed notifications. To resolve this: 
1. Go to Settings > Apps > Quran Majeed.
2. Ensure 'Allow Notifications' is enabled.
3. Turn off battery optimization or select 'Unrestricted' background usage.
4. On iOS, verify that Focus modes, Sleep mode, or Do Not Disturb are not active during prayer timings.
support.faq.notifications.q2: How do I change the Adhan voice or select another prayer calculation method?
support.faq.notifications.a2:
You can customize alerts inside the app:
1. Open Quran Majeed, enter Settings and select 'Prayer Times & Adhan'.
2. Tap 'Adhan Voice' to choose from reciters (Makkah, Madinah, Al-Aqsa, etc.).
3. Tap 'Calculation Method' to select regionally approved organizations (e.g., University of Islamic Sciences Karachi, MWL, ISNA, Egypt Survey).
support.faq.payments.title: Premium & Payments
support.faq.payments.q1: How do I restore my premium purchase on a new phone?
support.faq.payments.a1:
Purchases are linked directly to your Google Play Store or Apple ID account. To restore:
1. Ensure your device is logged into the identical Google or Apple account used to make the purchase.
2. Open Quran Majeed and head to settings.
3. Scroll down and tap 'Restore Purchase'. The premium features will instantly unlock.
support.faq.payments.q2: What payment options are available for premium features in Pakistan?
support.faq.payments.a2: Besides credit/debit cards on Google Play and Apple App Store, we have integrated regional checkout options on Android. You can upgrade using mobile wallets including EasyPaisa and JazzCash directly through the in-app purchase gateway.
support.faq.technical.title: App Settings & Content Support
support.faq.technical.q1: The app is crashing or audio translations fail to download. What should I do?
support.faq.technical.a1:
Try these basic troubleshooting steps:
1. Verify you have a stable Wi-Fi or cellular connection.
2. Clear Cache (Android: Settings > Apps > Quran Majeed > Storage > Clear Cache).
3. Restart your mobile device.
4. If the error continues, uninstall and reinstall the latest version of the app from the store.
support.faq.technical.q2: How do I report a spelling typo in translations or an audio gap in recitation?
support.faq.technical.a2:
Scriptural accuracy is our top priority. If you locate a translation discrepancy:
1. Take a screenshot showing the specific Surah and Ayah number.
2. Note the name of the Qari (reciter) or translation author.
3. Email details to support@pakdata.com. Our scholars and engineers will immediately verify it.

about.seo.title: About Us | Pakistan Data Management Services
about.seo.desc: Pioneering Islamic digital technology, Urdu computing, and mobile application engineering since 1979. Learn about our mission, vision, history, and collaborations.
about.milestone.1979.title: Company Founded
about.milestone.1979.desc: Pakistan Data Management Services (PDMS) was established, becoming one of Pakistan’s earliest software development companies.
about.milestone.1983.title: Urdu Software
about.milestone.1983.desc: Developed Urdu software for Commodore 64 systems, contributing to the early evolution of Urdu computing.
about.milestone.1989.title: Nastaleeq-e-Nizami
about.milestone.1989.desc: Released Nastaleeq-e-Nizami, the first Urdu Nastaleeq publishing software for Apple Macintosh and Laser printers.
about.milestone.1992.title: Urdu Computer Nizam
about.milestone.1992.desc: Launched Urdu Computer Nizam, one of the first Urdu database, spreadsheet, and presentation software systems for Apple Macintosh.
about.milestone.1995.title: Imagine: Criminal Identification System
about.milestone.1995.desc: Developed Imagine, a Criminal Identification and Sketching System used in Police SSP offices across Pakistan.
about.milestone.1996.title: PDMS Goes Online
about.milestone.1996.desc: Launched the official Pakdata website: www.pakdata.com
about.milestone.1998.title: Pakistani Databases and CDs
about.milestone.1998.desc: Provided consultancy services for Pakistan Citizens Database initiatives. Launched Quran Majeed CD and English-Urdu Dictionary CD.
about.milestone.2000.title: Launched Urduseek.com & CityIslam.com
about.milestone.2000.desc: Launched Urdu portal www.urduseek.com, submitted an Urdu Unicode proposal to the Unicode Consortium, and launched Quran portal www.cityislam.com.
about.milestone.2001.title: NADRA CNIC Project
about.milestone.2001.desc: Provided software development services to NADRA for Urdu database systems used in the CNIC project.
about.milestone.2003.title: Electoral Rolls & Pocket Alim
about.milestone.2003.desc: Developed Electoral Rolls software for the Election Commission of Pakistan and Pocket Alim software for mobile PDAs.
about.milestone.2005.title: Mobile Muslim Series & Quran Explorer
about.milestone.2005.desc: Developed Mobile Muslim software series for Windows Mobile devices, released Quran Majeed for Palm Pilot PDA, and provided development services for QuranExplorer.
about.milestone.2008.title: Collaborated with King Fahad Quran Printing Complex
about.milestone.2008.desc: Collaborated with King Fahad Quran Printing Complex in Madinah on Quran software initiatives. Launched Urdu Mahir and PDMS Jauhar, and delivered National Aliens Database software to NADRA.
about.milestone.2010.title: Quran Majeed for iOS
about.milestone.2010.desc: Released Quran Majeed for Apple iPhone iOS platform.
about.milestone.2012.title: 1 Million Downloads
about.milestone.2012.desc: Reached 1 million Quran Majeed app downloads globally.
about.milestone.2014.title: Quran Majeed for Android
about.milestone.2014.desc: Launched Quran Majeed for Android devices.
about.milestone.2015.title: Easy Urdu Keyboard
about.milestone.2016.title: Regional Language Keyboards
about.milestone.2016.desc: Launched EasySindhi, EasyPashto, and additional regional language keyboard applications.
about.milestone.2017.title: Google AdMob Strategic Partner
about.milestone.2017.desc: Selected by Google as an AdMob Strategic Partner in Pakistan.
about.milestone.2018.title: Quran TV and Visual Quran
about.milestone.2018.desc: Launched Quran TV and Visual Quran applications for iOS, Android, and Apple TV.
about.milestone.2019.title: 5 Million EasyUrdu Downloads
about.milestone.2019.desc: Reached 5 million downloads for EasyUrdu Keyboard.
about.milestone.2022.title: Quran Majeed YouTube Silver Button
about.milestone.2022.desc: Quran Majeed's app YouTube channel was awarded the Silver Button.
about.milestone.2024.title: 80M+ Quran Majeed App Downloads
about.milestone.2024.desc: Touched the milestone of 80M+ Quran Majeed app downloads.
about.milestone.2026.title: 100M+ Quran Majeed and 50M+ Easy Urdu Keyboard Downloads
about.milestone.2026.desc: Touched the milestone of 100M+ Quran Majeed app downloads and 50M+ Easy Urdu Keyboard downloads.
about.value.purpose.title: Purpose-Driven Innovation
about.value.purpose.text: We do not build software just for utility; we design technology that solves cultural, language, and spiritual accessibility needs.
about.value.authenticity.title: Unyielding Authenticity
about.value.authenticity.text: For all our Islamic applications, we work directly with certified scholars, institutions, and printing complexes to guarantee correctness.
about.value.scale.title: Global Scalability
about.value.scale.text: Engineering software systems designed to run seamlessly for millions of daily active users, maintaining high uptime and low latency.
about.value.modern.title: Continuous Modernization
about.value.modern.text: Actively modernizing our user interfaces, adding AI tools, and expanding platform compatibility.
